title: Ride My Mon [Cobblemon]
description: Adds more Pokemon to be rideable in Cobblemon 1.7
body:
---

🐾 Rideable Expansion for Cobblemon 1.7

![Mons](https://i.imgur.com/qtRycrh.png)

🎠 Looking to travel in style?

This addon expands Cobblemon’s rideable roster, allowing many additional Pokémon to be mounted, flown, or ridden across the world. From ground-bound speedsters to majestic fliers, this pack brings new mobility options to your adventure without altering core gameplay.

✨ What This Addon Does

  • Enables riding for a wide variety of Pokémon previously not mountable
  • Keeps movement balanced and faithful to Cobblemon’s mechanics
  • Perfect for exploration-focused playthroughs

How to Install

Put the ZIP file in your datapack folder of your world, and in your resourcepack folder.
